description: arXiv:2607.20430v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present LLM-INSTRUCT, the winning system for the UZH Shared Task at ArgMining 2026 on paragraph-level argument mining in UN and UNESCO resolutions. The task requires paragraph-type classification, prediction of a subset of 141 official tags, and directed relation prediction under a strict JSON schema setting using only open-weight models up t...
author: Phuong Huu Vu Tran, Long Minh Vo, Son Nguyen Minh Le, Hoang Van
